This example includes a prefilled input for the "faded" blank in the code. This can be used for hints or placeholders. Complete the code that counts words whose length meets a minimum threshold. Note that there is also a distractor among the available blocks. def count_long_words(words, min_len): #0given count = 0 #1given for word in words: #1given if len(word) >= !BLANK: #blank min_len count += 1 #2given count = len(words) #distractor return count #1given
